response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile aimed at first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL, could be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a trusted real estate agency dedicated to providing expert guidance to homeowners and business owners throughout central Florida. Our team offers comprehensive support for both buyers and sellers, covering all aspects of real estate transactions and financing. We are committed to building long-term relationships with our clients and ensuring a seamless and reliable real estate experience. Our services are available in key locations including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, and the Lake Nona Region. We operate with a small, dedicated team of real estate professionals who are passionate about helping you achieve your home-buying or home-selling goals.
